MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Gargano; Clerk V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff M.S. Amin is present.
Attorney, Arnold Evje Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

There is no appearance by the defendant.

The SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR DUE TO NON APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. The SEP-08-2009 trial date remains set.
